core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss Poster aesthetics with SaaS functionality.
Emotion First: The UI must feel 'True' and 'Analytical'.
Content is King: The review text is the hero.
Negative Space: High density data needs breathing room.
Contrast: Stark black/white with signal colors for Fake/Genuine.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on the background to prevent sterility.

animations.micro_interactions: Buttons invert colors on hover (Solid Black -> White w/ Black Border).

layout.spacing_system: Generous. Use p-8 or p-12 for containers.
layout.grid_strategy: Bento Grid Mode B (High Density) for the dashboard, Mode A (Tetris) for the landing.

buttons.style: Sharp edges (rounded-none). High contrast. Primary: Blue bg, White text. Secondary: White bg, Black border.

cards.style: No shadow. 1px solid border (border-gray-200). White background.
cards.header: Border-bottom 1px solid gray-100. Bold uppercase title.

inputs.style: bg-gray-50 border-b-2 border-gray-200 focus:border-brand-blue focus:ring-0 rounded-none px-4 py-3

charts.style: Minimalist. Thin lines. No grid lines in the chart area if possible. Use brand colors.

images.description: Abstract light technology background, clean and analytical.
Magnifying glass on document, representing scrutiny.

assets.icons: Lucide React (default). Use thin strokes (stroke-width={1.5}) for a precise look.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install 'clsx' and 'tailwind-merge' if missing. Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the new colors and font families.
2. FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to 'index.css'. Apply the font families to the body and headings.
3. GLOBAL STYLES: In 'index.css', set the root variables to the Light Theme palette defined above. Remove any default dark mode variables if they conflict.
4. LAYOUT: Create a 'Layout' component that includes a sticky header (Glassmorphism: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b) and a footer.
- HOME: Hero section with the 'analysis_concept' image. Large 'Check Review' input area (central focus).
- DASHBOARD: Use the Bento Grid. Widgets for 'Total Reviews Scanned', 'Fake vs Genuine Ratio', 'Recent Activity'.
- HISTORY: A clean table view using Shadcn Table. Use badges for 'Fake'/'Genuine' status.
6. COMPONENTS: Customize Shadcn components to match the 'Swiss' aesthetic (remove rounded corners, increase contrast).
7. MICRO-INTERACTIONS: Add hover states to all interactive elements. Use 'sonner' for toast notifications on successful analysis.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise.
Ensure all text has high contrast (APCA standards).
Do not center-align long text blocks.
